mapper.select: SELECT id , stock_cd , fiscal_year , fiscal_quarter , period_end_dt , revenue , gross_profit , operating_income , net_income , operating_cash_flow , free_cash_flow , capex , depreciation , total_assets , accounts_receivable , inventory , cogs , rd_expense , sga_expense , ebitda , net_debt , reg_dt , upd_dt FROM financial_statements WHERE stock_cd = #{stockCd} ORDER BY fiscal_year DESC, fiscal_quarter DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT DISTINCT stock_cd FROM financial_statements ORDER BY stock_cd
